subcodes.first_line: This is the Book We have revealed in truth unto them that turn towards the Most Great Ocean, Who hath manifested Himself in human form. Blessed be He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزلناه بالحق لمن اقبل الی البحر الاعظم الذی ظهر علی هیکل الانسان تبارک
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
